sys_update_version.name: sp_instance_5ffceb5d47d90f14516b5ac5316d4397
sys_update_version.payload: truefalsefalsedesktop,tablet,mobileviewportdefault1{ "mobile": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" }, "desktop": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" }, "tablet": { "height": "250px", "width": "100%" } }<!-- AngularJS template with configurable options. Use the `options` object to control dynamic behavior. Example: Display an element when max row count is 10: <div ng-if="options.maxRowCount === 10"></div> The `skeleton-container` class is used for loading placeholders. --> <div class="skeleton-container"> <!-- Header Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-header"></div> <!-- Body Skeleton --> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line small"></div> <div class="skeleton-box skeleton-line medium"></div> </div>falsemdcb3c231d47d90f14516b5ac5316d43008679ef89cb21120000f8d856634c9c4fsp_instanceadmin2026-06-05 06:58:365ffceb5d47d90f14516b5ac5316d439722913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d43012913deb94745cb90516b5ac5316d4301sp_instance_5ffceb5d47d90f14516b5ac5316d4397admin2026-06-05 10:26:04<url/><widget_parameters><![CDATA[{ "html": { "value": "<p><link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0-beta3/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet"></p> <div class="pulse-carousel"> <div class="carousel-container"> <div class="carousel-slide active"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>💧<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">Staying hydrated boosts your energy and mental clarity. Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily!</p> </div> <div class="carousel-slide"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>🍎<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">A balanced diet rich in fruits and vegetables strengthens your immune system naturally.</p> </div> <div class="carousel-slide"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>😴<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">Quality sleep (7–8 hours) improves memory, mood, and overall health. Prioritize rest!</p> </div> <div class="carousel-slide"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>💊<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">Always follow prescription instructions. Never share your medication with others.</p> </div> </div> <button class="carousel-prev"></button> <button class="carousel-next"></button> <div class="carousel-dots"> </div> </div> <style> /* ===== تصميم الكاروسيل ===== */ .pulse-carousel { position: relative; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFFFF, #FFF5F5); border-radius: 32px; padding: 40px 30px; margin: 48px 0; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border: 1px solid #FEE2E2; } .carousel-container { position: relative; min-height: 180px; } .carousel-slide { display: none; animation: fadeEffect 0.5s ease-in-out; } .carousel-slide.active { display: block; } @keyframes fadeEffect { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .tip-icon { font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: #E60000; /* لون الإيموجي أحمر */ } .tip-text { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: #1E293B; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 20px; } /* أزرار التنقل */ .carousel-prev, .carousel-next { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: rgba(230, 0, 0, 0.7); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; z-index: 5; } .carousel-prev:hover, .carousel-next:hover { background-color: #E60000; transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1.05); } .carousel-prev { left: 15px; } .carousel-next { right: 15px; } /* النقاط (dots) */ .carousel-dots { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 30px; } .dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; background-color: #CBD5E1; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .dot.active { background-color: #E60000; width: 24px; border-radius: 8px; } /* استجابة للشاشات الصغيرة */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .pulse-carousel { padding: 30px 20px; } .tip-text { font-size: 15px; } .carousel-prev, .carousel-next { width: 32px; height: 32px; } } </style>", "displayValue": "<p><link href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.0.0-beta3/css/all.min.css" rel="stylesheet"></p> <div class="pulse-carousel"> <div class="carousel-container"> <div class="carousel-slide active"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>💧<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">Staying hydrated boosts your energy and mental clarity. Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily!</p> </div> <div class="carousel-slide"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>🍎<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">A balanced diet rich in fruits and vegetables strengthens your immune system naturally.</p> </div> <div class="carousel-slide"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>😴<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">Quality sleep (7–8 hours) improves memory, mood, and overall health. Prioritize rest!</p> </div> <div class="carousel-slide"> <div class="tip-icon">]]>💊<![CDATA[</div> <p class="tip-text">Always follow prescription instructions. Never share your medication with others.</p> </div> </div> <button class="carousel-prev"></button> <button class="carousel-next"></button> <div class="carousel-dots"> </div> </div> <style> /* ===== تصميم الكاروسيل ===== */ .pulse-carousel { position: relative; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFFFFF, #FFF5F5); border-radius: 32px; padding: 40px 30px; margin: 48px 0; text-align: center; box-shadow: 0 8px 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); border: 1px solid #FEE2E2; } .carousel-container { position: relative; min-height: 180px; } .carousel-slide { display: none; animation: fadeEffect 0.5s ease-in-out; } .carousel-slide.active { display: block; } @keyframes fadeEffect { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } } .tip-icon { font-size: 48px; margin-bottom: 16px; color: #E60000; /* لون الإيموجي أحمر */ } .tip-text { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 500; color: #1E293B; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 700px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 20px; } /* أزرار التنقل */ .carousel-prev, .carousel-next { position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%); background-color: rgba(230, 0, 0, 0.7); color: white; border: none; border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s ease; z-index: 5; } .carousel-prev:hover, .carousel-next:hover { background-color: #E60000; transform: translateY(-50%) scale(1.05); } .carousel-prev { left: 15px; } .carousel-next { right: 15px; } /* النقاط (dots) */ .carousel-dots { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 10px; margin-top: 30px; } .dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; background-color: #CBD5E1; border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer; transition: all 0.2s; } .dot.active { background-color: #E60000; width: 24px; border-radius: 8px; } /* استجابة للشاشات الصغيرة */ @media (max-width: 768px) { .pulse-carousel { padding: 30px 20px; } .tip-text { font-size: 15px; } .carousel-prev, .carousel-next { width: 32px; height: 32px; } } </style>" } }]]></widget_parameters></sp_instance><sys_translated_text action="delete_multiple" query="documentkey=5ffceb5d47d90f14516b5ac5316d4397"/></record_update>
